user_persona: Yaba diner who orders local swallow meals and cares about soup consistency, texture, and value.
product_details:
Product:
Bukka Hut Alagomeji-Yaba

Category: food
Description: Family restaurant in Alagomeji-Yaba serving rice dishes, soups, swallow meals, proteins, dine-in, takeout, and delivery.
Location: 271 Herbert Macaulay Way, Alagomeji-Yaba, Lagos, Nigeria
Observed review-backed experience: A diner ordered seafood okro and pounded yam, found the soup watery and lacking taste, and felt the pounded yam was too soft; another visible review described the branch as clean with polite staff and filling food.
Google Maps listing: 4.2 stars across 1,308 reviews; visible review themes include suya, jollof rice, shawarma, and pounded yam.

expected.reference_review: I would not rate this Bukka Hut visit highly. The seafood okro was watery and lacked taste, and the pounded yam was too soft, even though the branch looked clean.

review_signals: seafood okro was watery and low-taste
pounded yam texture was too soft
clean environment and polite staff appeared in another visible review

user_persona: Yaba moviegoer who wants a comfortable viewing experience, pleasant ambience, and easy evening entertainment.
product_details:
Product:
The Ozone e-centre tsboi

Category: cinema
Description: Movie theater at Ozone e-centre in Yaba with cinema screens, evening movie access, nearby shops, and entertainment facilities.
Location: Ozone e-centre, 1-11 Commercial Avenue, Yaba, Lagos, Nigeria
Observed review-backed experience: Visible reviews described good ambience, comfortable atmosphere, and enjoyable viewing; one visible review also mentioned the lift being under repair while still having a nice movie-entry experience.
Google Maps listing: 4.1 stars across 8,696 reviews; visible review themes include hangout spot, blockbuster movies, and free popcorn.

expected.reference_review: The Ozone cinema was comfortable for an evening movie and the ambience made the viewing enjoyable. The lift issue was annoying, but the movie-entry experience still worked well.

review_signals: good ambience around the cinema entry
lift repair surfaced as a minor access issue

user_persona: Mainland Lagos shopper who compares market organization, affordability, parking, and customer relations.
product_details:
Product:
Tejuosho Market Yaba Lagos

Category: retail
Description: Yaba shopping market and mall area for clothing, fabrics, household goods, general shopping, and affordable retail.
Location: Tejuoso Complex, Murtala Muhammed Way, Yaba, Lagos, Nigeria
Observed review-backed experience: Visible Google Maps result snippets described a conducive market with parking and friendly customer relations, a better-structured and more organized market than many Lagos alternatives, and affordable items.
Google Maps listing: 4.1 stars across 2,690 reviews for one result; nearby Tejuosho market listings show 4.1 to 4.2 stars across larger review counts.

expected.reference_review: Tejuosho is a more organized market than many Lagos options. Parking helps, prices are fair, and the customer relations make fabric and general shopping less stressful.

review_signals: parking and customer relations mentioned positively

user_persona: Lagos caregiver who values stocked pharmacies, professional staff, and reliable access to medicines.
product_details:
Product:
Medplus Pharmacy Lagos

Category: health
Description: Lagos pharmacy chain with multiple branches for medication pickup, wellness products, family health errands, and professional pharmacy service.
Location: Lagos, Nigeria
Observed review-backed experience: Visible Google Maps snippets for Lagos branches described excellent customer service, professionalism, well-stocked shelves, friendly staff, and strong medicine or product availability; one visible snippet noted a branch can be busy while still having many medicines and products.
Google Maps listings: visible branch ratings ranged from 4.1 to 4.7 stars, with review counts from 10 to 290 depending on branch.

expected.reference_review: Medplus is a reliable pharmacy for family medicine runs. The shelves are well stocked, staff are professional, and even when a branch is busy I can usually find what I need.

review_signals: busy branch still had many medicines and products

user_persona: Abuja remote worker who needs productive workspace, stable power, meeting rooms, and practical parking.
product_details:
Product:
Work and Connect

Category: service
Description: Coworking space in Jabi for shared desks, meeting rooms, training rooms, private offices, virtual offices, events, and productive work.
Location: 50 Ebitu Ukiwe Street, Jabi, Abuja, Nigeria
Observed review-backed experience: Visible reviews described a conducive and generally reliable workspace with mostly stable power, useful meeting and productive-work facilities, coworking and virtual office options, training rooms, event halls, and boardrooms; a visible review noted parking can be challenging, especially on Mondays.
Google Maps listing: 4.4 stars across 328 reviews; visible review themes include shared desks, conference rooms, training rooms, and private offices.

expected.reference_review: Work and Connect is a productive workspace with useful meeting rooms and mostly stable power. Parking can be stressful, especially on busy days, so I would not call it flawless.

user_persona: Lagos patient who values hospital hygiene, clear billing, clean environment, and careful staff communication.
product_details:
Product:
Reddington Hospital

Category: health
Description: Private hospital in Victoria Island with clinical care, diagnostics, specialist services, patient treatment, and hospital administration.
Location: 12 Idowu Martins Street, Victoria Island, Lagos, Nigeria
Observed review-backed experience: Visible reviews were mixed: one complaint raised hygiene, itemized billing, and refund concerns, while other visible reviews praised leadership, clean environment, staff, and treatment quality.
Google Maps listing: 3.8 stars across 179 reviews; visible review themes include pediatrics, neurology, clean environment, and cardiology.

expected.reference_review: Reddington has some good specialist care and a clean environment, but the hygiene complaints and unclear billing concerns are serious. For a private hospital, those issues reduce trust.

review_signals: hygiene and billing complaints appeared in a visible review
clean environment and good treatment appeared in positive reviews
overall listing rating was mixed rather than uniformly high
